meaning: n.福斯蒂娜(亦译福斯泰娜)(f.)
examples: After the death of Faustina, Fabia192 tried to manoeuvre a marriage with him.
Indeed, Faustina and the girl who was given in marriage were both opposed to this match.
Ms Faustina Urassa, who opened our ceremony today, has described so well the impact of these obstacles on her own life.
In recent years, Ms. Stephens has reconstructed the styles of ancient royals including Faustina the Younger and Empress Plotina sometimes on live models.
